ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Ashika Global Securities Limited successfully converted 200,000 non-promoter equity convertible warrants into equity shares at ₹609 each, raising ₹9.135 Crores and consequently increasing its paid-up share capital. A significant red flag, however, is the forfeiture of 1,600,000 (88.9%) of the initially allotted warrants due to non-exercise within the 18-month period, indicating that a substantial portion of the planned capital raise did not materialize and potentially reflecting a lack of investor confidence or market attractiveness at the exercise price.
